references.text: [Er93] Erd\H{o}s, Paul, Some of my favorite solved and unsolved problems in graph theory. Quaestiones Math. (1993), 333-350.

statement.text: Is there a constant $c>0$ such that every graph on $2^n$ vertices with minimum degree $>(1-c)2^n$ contains the $n$-dimensional hypercube $Q_n$?
